user_outcome: A SwornAgent operator runs sworn endpoint-conformance against a declared endpoint, receives a schema-valid secret-safe observation record, regenerates or checks the checked-in dialect table, and subsequent OAI requests apply the table's observed wire-shaping fields without treating endpoint observations as model capabilities.
rationale: OpenAI compatibility has no universal dialect metadata. This slice replaces production discovery-by-failure with fixed synthetic probes and a generated, reviewable runtime artefact. Raw observations preserve time/model context; generation removes volatile and capability fields so the embedded table is deterministic. The OAI client consumes only request-shaping facts. S04/S05 remain the authority for whether a particular model can provide structured output, tools, reasoning, or deterministic role behaviour. This slice owns contract C-06.
in_scope: Add a self-registered `sworn endpoint-conformance` command with `probe`, `generate`, and `check` actions. `probe` requires one declared provider prefix and explicit model, resolves endpoint/auth through S01 config, uses only fixed public synthetic prompts/tools, and writes raw endpoint-dialect-record-v1 observations to an explicit output path.

Raw observations contain provider, safe endpoint identity (scheme/host only, with userinfo/query/fragment removed), probe_model, observed_at, client-parser self-check results, per-probe accepted/rejected/ignored/inconclusive classifications, status code/error class, and token counts when returned. They never contain API keys, Authorization values, request/response bodies, model text, workspace data, or prompt payloads.

Probe the known request quirk with a tool-only assistant turn whose content field is explicitly present as an empty string, followed by a tool result. Record whether the endpoint accepts the continuation. The deterministic self-check must also run a mutated omission fixture that the strict fixture endpoint rejects, proving the guard can fail.

Reproduce nullable tool_calls as a client-parser self-check using the exact `tool_calls: null` response shape. The normal parser must accept it; a mutation fixture that rejects null must fail, with both observations preserved as proof of guard sensitivity.

Run live probes for strict json_schema response_format, one forced function tool, max_tokens, max_completion_tokens, system role, developer role, multiple stop sequences, streaming, and reasoning_effort. Negative provider responses are valid observations when classified; transport/auth/protocol failure or an invalid record makes the command exit non-zero.

Probe temperature: 0 with three identical fixed synthetic calls. Record `stable`, `unstable`, or `inconclusive`; never claim that identical text proves the provider honored temperature. The observation remains capability/determinism evidence and is excluded from runtime dialect profiles in this release.

`generate --input <record.json>` accepts one repeatable flag per single-record file and requires exactly one record per provider. It selects only token_limit_parameter, instruction_role, and constant assistant_content_policy=always_present, sorts providers/fields, retains probe_model as source_model, strips timestamps/capability observations, rejects duplicate/ambiguous providers, and atomically writes the explicit --output path (internal/model/dialects.json for the checked-in invocation).

Embed and validate internal/model/dialects.json at startup/use. S01's endpoint constructor attaches canonical provider identity to OAI; OAI request shaping consults the embedded profile for token-limit field and instruction role while continuing to decode nullable tool_calls and emit assistant content conservatively for every provider.

`check` regenerates normalized profiles from supplied observations in memory, byte-compares canonical JSON with the checked-in table, exits 0 on equality, and exits non-zero with provider/field names on drift without printing observed bodies. It never writes the repository.

Capability observations (structured output, forced tools, reasoning, temperature stability, streaming) remain in raw records under a separate namespace and are never read by the runtime dialect loader; their later consumer is S04-provider-registry/S05-capability-eligibility.
out_of_scope: Endpoint/config construction and credential ownership are S01-endpoint-registry-config.
Registry availability and loop dispatch are S02-keyless-loop-dispatch.
Nightly matrix orchestration, mandatory rows, CI artifacts, and external credentials are S04-live-provider-matrix.
Automatically committing regenerated tables is forbidden; a human reviews and commits candidates.
Dynamic first-use dialect discovery/cache is excluded.
Promoting capability observations into runtime role eligibility is excluded and remains S04/S05.

effort_complexity.rationale: The slice introduces a public CLI, a probe protocol, two record forms, deterministic generation, embedded runtime request shaping, and mutation-sensitive tests across inconsistent external APIs. The breadth and emergent live-provider behaviour make it both large and complex.

risks.description: Capability results are mistaken for endpoint-wide dialect facts and hard-code one probed model's abilities onto every model behind that endpoint.
risks.mitigation: The schema namespaces capability_observations separately; generation has an allowlist of dialect-only fields and tests prove runtime rejects/ignores capability keys. S04/S05 is the only downstream capability consumer.

risks.description: Nightly regeneration always drifts because timestamps, endpoint queries, or volatile response data enter the checked-in table.
risks.mitigation: Raw and normalized record types are distinct. Generation strips observed_at and all response content, canonicalizes/sorts JSON, and a repeat-generation test asserts byte identity.

risks.description: The conformance command leaks prompts, model outputs, response bodies, or credentials into logs and artifacts.
risks.mitigation: Use fixed non-sensitive probes, classify errors without bodies, sanitize endpoint identity, define records without body/value fields, and scan command output/artifacts for injected canary secrets and payload strings.

risks.description: The suite claims to guard the two known bugs but its tests could never fail when those bugs are reintroduced.
risks.mitigation: Required mutation fixtures omit assistant content and reject nullable tool_calls, observe failure, then restore normal behavior and observe success; proof preserves both sides.

risks.description: Temperature stability is overclaimed as proof that temperature zero is honored.
risks.mitigation: The record vocabulary is stable/unstable/inconclusive over three repeated calls and the docs explicitly forbid an honored=true claim from identical outputs alone.

acceptance_criteria.text:
WHEN `sworn endpoint-conformance probe` runs THE SYSTEM SHALL accept flags after the action in split or `--name=value` form, in any order, with --provider, --model, and --output each present exactly once and non-empty; an unknown flag, duplicate singleton, missing value, positional argument, or missing required flag exits64 before config, credential, clock, filesystem, or network access, with empty stdout and stderr exactly `endpoint-conformance: usage: probe --provider <prefix> --model <model> --output <path>
`. Invoking endpoint-conformance without an action exits64 with `endpoint-conformance: usage: <probe|generate|check>
`; an action other than probe, generate, or check exits64 with `endpoint-conformance: unknown action: <action>
`. After valid flags, execution stops on the first failing stage in this order: validate embedded manifest; resolve provider; load/validate config; resolve credential; run assistant_content self-check; run nullable_tool_calls self-check; run live probes in manifest order; build/schema-validate record; atomically write output. The embedded UTF-8 JSON manifest has no BOM, duplicate keys, trailing non-whitespace, or unknown fields and is exactly top-level `{"version":1,"probes":[<Probe>],"self_checks":[{"name":"assistant_content"},{"name":"nullable_tool_calls"}]}`. Each Probe has exactly name,messages,request_overrides. Probe names/order are strict_json_schema,forced_tool,max_tokens,max_completion_tokens,system_role,developer_role,multiple_stops,streaming,reasoning_effort,temperature_zero. Their messages/overrides respectively are: one user `Return only the JSON object {"probe":"ok"}.` plus `{response_format:{type:json_schema,json_schema:{name:sworn_probe,strict:true,schema:{type:object,properties:{probe:{type:string,const:ok}},required:[probe],additionalProperties:false}}}}`; one user `Call sworn_probe with value ok.` plus `{tools:[{type:function,function:{name:sworn_probe,description:Return the probe value.,parameters:{type:object,properties:{value:{type:string,const:ok}},required:[value],additionalProperties:false}}}],tool_choice:{type:function,function:{name:sworn_probe}}}`; one user `Return exactly TOKEN.` plus `{max_tokens:1}`; the same message plus `{max_completion_tokens:1}`; system `Respond exactly SWORN_SYSTEM_PROBE_7F3A` then user `Follow the instruction.` plus `{}`; developer `Respond exactly SWORN_DEVELOPER_PROBE_7F3A` then the same user message plus `{}`; one user `Return exactly alpha STOP_A beta STOP_B gamma.` plus `{stop:[STOP_A,STOP_B]}`; one user `Return exactly stream-ok.` plus `{stream:true}`; one user `Return exactly reason-ok.` plus `{reasoning_effort:low}`; one user `Return exactly temperature-ok.` plus `{temperature:0}`. Every message object has only role/content. Each live request is compact Go JSON with no terminal LF and exactly model,messages,then the non-empty override top fields in displayed order. Manifest/provider/config/credential/output failures exit2 with empty stdout and respectively exact stderr `endpoint-conformance: invalid embedded probe manifest
`, `endpoint-conformance: unknown provider: <prefix>
`, `endpoint-conformance: invalid config
`, `endpoint-conformance: credential unavailable: provider=<prefix>
`, or `endpoint-conformance: cannot write output: <filepath.ToSlash(filepath.Clean(output))>
`. A self-check/live/record failure exits2 with empty stdout and exact stderr `endpoint-conformance: probe failed: provider=<prefix> probe=<strict_json_schema|forced_tool|max_tokens|max_completion_tokens|system_role|developer_role|multiple_stops|streaming|reasoning_effort|temperature_zero|assistant_content|nullable_tool_calls|record> class=<transport|auth|credits|timeout|rate-limit|http-status-<decimal-code>|protocol|record-schema>
`; it creates/replaces no output. Success exits0 with empty stdout/stderr (C-06,N-03).

WHEN assistant-content self-check runs THE SYSTEM SHALL send compact JSON object fields model,messages only; model=`fixture`; messages exactly assistant `{role:assistant,tool_calls:[{id:call_1,type:function,function:{name:sworn_probe,arguments:"{\"value\":\"ok\"}"}}]}` then tool `{role:tool,tool_call_id:call_1,content:"{\"ok\":true}"}`. Mutated omits assistant content; restored inserts assistant content empty string at field order role,content,tool_calls; no other difference/fields. Omitted response status400/no headers/zero body; restored status200/sole Content-Type application/json/body exact `{"choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"done","tool_calls":null},"finish_reason":"stop"}]}` no LF. Only mutated=protocol-rejected/restored=accepted succeeds. Implementer writes heading `## AC-02 assistant-content mutation` then exact lines `self_checks.assistant_content.mutated=protocol-rejected` and `self_checks.assistant_content.restored=accepted` in `docs/release/2026-07-14-local-cloud-providers/S03-endpoint-dialect-conformance/journal.md`; proof.json reachability.evidence contains `journal.md#AC-02-assistant-content-mutation` and `TestContentPresenceMutationProof` (N-03).

WHEN nullable-tool-calls self-check feeds exact UTF-8 bytes `{"choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"","tool_calls":null},"finish_reason":"stop"}]}` with no trailing bytes to two parsers THE SYSTEM SHALL require production=accepted and mutation=protocol-error. The mutation parser SHALL share the production parser's entire decode/validation path and differ only at one injected predicate that rejects JSON null for message.tool_calls. Two controls replace the tool_calls member respectively by omission and by `[]`; production and mutation parsers SHALL both return accepted for the omitted control and both return accepted for the empty-array control, so an always-rejecting mutation fails. Implementer writes heading `## AC-03 nullable-tool-calls mutation` then lines `self_checks.nullable_tool_calls.production=accepted` and `self_checks.nullable_tool_calls.mutation=protocol-error` in that order in `docs/release/2026-07-14-local-cloud-providers/S03-endpoint-dialect-conformance/journal.md`; same slice proof.json reachability.evidence contains exact strings `journal.md#AC-03-nullable-tool-calls-mutation` and `TestNullableToolCallsMutationProof` (N-03).

THE SYSTEM SHALL classify each live probe independently with a fresh exact 60-second per-call context deadline, no whole-command deadline, and injected timer for immediate tests. errors.Is(err,context.DeadlineExceeded) is checked before other RoundTrip errors: timeout versus transport. HTTP401/403=auth,402=credits,408=timeout,429=rate-limit; every1xx/3xx/5xx/status>=600 is fatal http-status-<decimal-code>; every other4xx is rejected with status_code=<decimal-code>,error_class=`http-status-<decimal-code>`,body unparsed. Fatal stops through AC-01. Nonstream2xx must be UTF-8/no BOM/no duplicate keys, one JSON value plus whitespace, top object choices array length1 plus optional usage; unknown members ignored. Choice requires integer index0,message object,finish_reason string. Message requires non-empty role and content string, or content null only with non-empty tool_calls. Each call requires non-empty id,type exactly function,function object with non-empty name and arguments string. usage.input_tokens/output_tokens if present are non-negative integers; wrong recognized shapes are protocol. strict content must decode an object: exact `{"probe":"ok"}` accepted, another object ignored, null/array/string/number/malformed protocol. forced arguments must decode object: exactly one sworn_probe with exact `{"value":"ok"}` accepted, another object/call/name ignored, nonobject/malformed/invalid call structure protocol; absent/null/empty calls with empty content inconclusive and with non-empty content ignored. max_tokens/max_completion_tokens accept usage.output_tokens<=1, ignore >1, accept absent output_tokens when finish_reason exactly `length`, otherwise inconclusive. system_role/developer_role apply strings.TrimSpace to content and accept respectively `SWORN_SYSTEM_PROBE_7F3A`/`SWORN_DEVELOPER_PROBE_7F3A`, ignore other non-empty trimmed content, classify empty trimmed string inconclusive; null without non-empty calls is protocol. multiple_stops accepts only finish_reason exactly `stop` and content exactly `alpha `; any valid content containing exact case-sensitive substring `STOP_A`,`STOP_B`,`beta`,or `gamma` is ignored regardless finish_reason; other valid result inconclusive. reasoning_effort accepts every valid2xx. Streaming: missing/empty Content-Type parses ordinary JSON and ignores if valid; unparsable non-empty Content-Type protocol; parsed media type text/event-stream invokes SSE; another parsed type parses ordinary JSON and ignores if valid. SSE events are delimited by one-or-more blank lines; LF/CRLF accepted; comment-only events ignored; every non-comment event contains exactly one line `data: <payload>`, while zero or multiple data lines are protocol, never concatenated/independent. Trim surrounding ASCII space from payload. Before sentinel, payload is duplicate-free JSON with either one index0 choice containing delta object and required finish_reason null|non-empty string, or choices=[] plus post-finish usage. Present delta.role must be string exactly `assistant`; another value/type protocol. delta.content optional null|string; role/content may coexist or delta empty; append string content and require one non-empty fragment. finish_reason null before finish; first non-empty string marks finish, appends same-chunk content, forbids later choices. Zero/one usage-only event after finish; usage before finish protocol. Terminal payload is exact seven ASCII bytes `[DONE]`, once after finish, with no later data. strings.TrimSpace(accumulated)==`stream-ok` accepted; another valid stream ignored; any framing/order/JSON/duplicate/missing-content violation protocol (N-03).

WHEN the temperature-zero probe runs THE SYSTEM SHALL attempt three byte-identical fixed requests sequentially. Any fatal timeout, transport, auth, credits, rate-limit, 1xx, 3xx, 5xx, status>=600, or malformed-protocol outcome aborts immediately on that call, makes no later calls, exits via AC-01, and writes no record. Otherwise exactly three calls occur. If all three are valid 2xx with non-empty content, aggregate classification is accepted and byte-for-byte untrimmed comparison yields stable when all match or unstable otherwise. If all three are classified 4xx, classification=rejected, stability=inconclusive. Mixed 2xx/classified-4xx or any valid 2xx empty content yields classification=inconclusive, stability=inconclusive; classification never ignored. Generation excludes temperature_stability; record schema permits only stable|unstable|inconclusive and rejects temperature_honored/temperature_supported/temperature_deterministic (N-03).

WHEN `sworn endpoint-conformance generate` runs THE SYSTEM SHALL accept flags after the action in split or `--name=value` form, any order, with one-or-more non-empty repeatable --input values, exactly one non-empty --output, no positional/unknown flags, and no duplicate output; invalid grammar exits64 before I/O with empty stdout and stderr exactly `endpoint-conformance: usage: generate --input <record.json>... --output <profiles.json>
`. Clean input paths with filepath.Clean, sort them by UTF-8 byte order, and validate in that order. Each input must be readable, UTF-8/no BOM, one duplicate-free JSON value with no trailing non-whitespace, valid against endpoint-dialect-record-v1, and contain a provider string byte-equal to an S01 declared Prefix matching `[a-z][a-z0-9-]*`; no trim/case/alias normalization. Provider is extractable only from a duplicate-free top object with no trailing data and a canonical provider string; unreadable/malformed/duplicate/trailing/missing/invalid provider reports `-`, while another schema error reports the extracted provider. The first record error exits2 empty stdout/unchanged output with `endpoint-conformance: invalid observations: provider=<prefix-or-> field=record reason=schema-invalid
`. After file validation, duplicate provider exits2 with field=provider reason=duplicate-provider. For each provider, token_limit_parameter is max_tokens if max_tokens classification accepted, else max_completion_tokens if accepted, else exit2 field=token_limit_parameter reason=no-accepted-token-parameter; instruction_role is system if system_role accepted, else developer if accepted, else exit2 field=instruction_role reason=no-accepted-instruction-role. Every invalid-observations line uses exactly `endpoint-conformance: invalid observations: provider=<prefix-or-> field=<record|provider|token_limit_parameter|instruction_role> reason=<schema-invalid|duplicate-provider|no-accepted-token-parameter|no-accepted-instruction-role>
`. Output data model is exactly `{"$schema":"https://swornagent.dev/schemas/endpoint-dialect-profiles-v1.json","profiles":{"<provider>":{"assistant_content_policy":"always_present","instruction_role":"system|developer","source_model":"<probe_model>","token_limit_parameter":"max_tokens|max_completion_tokens"}},"version":1}` with one profile per provider/no extras; capability observations, attempts, endpoints, timestamps, payloads, secrets, and bodies are never read into profiles. Sort providers/fields lexically; encode UTF-8 json.MarshalIndent two spaces, Go HTML escaping, one LF/no BOM. Atomically create O_EXCL mode0600 temp in destination directory, write all, Sync, Close, Rename; create/write/Sync/Close/Rename failure removes temp, preserves existing destination before successful Rename, exits2 empty stdout and stderr exactly `endpoint-conformance: cannot write output: <filepath.ToSlash(filepath.Clean(output))>
`. Success exits0 empty streams (C-06,N-03).

WHEN an OAI request is built for a provider with an embedded dialect profile THE SYSTEM SHALL use only OAI.MaxOutputTokens: 0 omits both token fields; >0 emits recorded field only; <0 makes OAI.Chat return exported sentinel model.ErrInvalidMaxOutputTokens whose Error() is exactly `model: max output tokens must be non-negative`, with zero HTTP calls. No current sworn command accepts a max-output-token input, so no command exit mapping is added in this slice; the test invokes OAI.Chat directly and errors.Is the sentinel. chatRequest exposes no separate wire-token inputs. Every original system/developer message is cloned and Role set to profile instruction_role: system maps both to system; developer maps both to developer. Preserve order, Content, Name, ToolCallID pointer, ToolCalls nil/empty distinction and all nested bytes; do not merge. user/assistant/tool unchanged. content always emitted; empty Name/nil ToolCallID/zero-length ToolCalls omitted; assistant empty content emitted; response tool_calls:null accepted. capability_observations has no runtime read path (C-06, N-03).

WHEN `sworn endpoint-conformance check` runs THE SYSTEM SHALL accept flags after action in split or `--name=value` form, any order, with one-or-more non-empty repeatable --input, exactly one non-empty --table, no positional/unknown flags/duplicate table; invalid grammar exits64 before I/O, empty stdout, stderr exactly `endpoint-conformance: usage: check --input <record.json>... --table <profiles.json>
`. Clean/sort input paths UTF-8 byte order and validate/derive before opening table. Each input is readable UTF-8/no BOM/one duplicate-free value/no trailing non-whitespace, valid record schema, canonical provider and non-empty probe_model. probe_model is the byte-exact decoded JSON string originally supplied by --model; never trimmed, case-folded, path-cleaned, alias-resolved, or normalized, and exact value becomes source_model. First invalid input exits2 with exact invalid-observations provider/field/reason diagnostic; duplicate/no-token/no-role precedence max_tokens then max_completion_tokens, system then developer. Table nonexistent uses missing; other read error unreadable; invalid UTF-8/BOM/JSON/duplicate/trailing uses invalid-json; schema violation schema-invalid; schema-valid noncanonical bytes non-canonical. Each exits2 empty stdout and stderr exactly `endpoint-conformance: invalid table: <missing|unreadable|invalid-json|schema-invalid|non-canonical>
`. Derive assistant_content_policy=always_present,instruction_role,source_model=probe_model,token_limit_parameter. Equality exits0 empty. Drift exits1 stderr empty. Provider only derived emits `drift: provider=<prefix> field=profile change=added
`; only table emits removed. Each unequal shared-provider property emits exactly `drift: provider=<prefix> field=<assistant_content_policy|instruction_role|source_model|token_limit_parameter> change=changed
`; no profile line. Sort provider then field UTF-8 byte order. No create/write/rename/remove/git; table/repository unchanged (C-06,N-03).

IF API key is exact `sk-secret-DO-NOT-PRINT` and payload canary exact `payload-DO-NOT-PRINT` THE SYSTEM SHALL prove three subtests in `internal/endpointconformance/conformance_test.go:TestConformanceOutputSecretAndPayloadSafe`: `success-response` injects the payload canary as message.content in an otherwise-valid reasoning_effort 2xx fixture, supplies ordinary valid accepted/rejected observations for every other probe so probe exits0, runs generate then check, and asserts both canaries absent from every captured stdout/stderr, raw record bytes, generated table bytes, and check diagnostics; `error-body` injects the payload canary as the body of a simulated HTTP500 response and asserts both canaries absent from probe stdout/stderr and that no output exists; `request-builder` sets RequestEnvelope.RawRequest to bytes containing the payload canary, calls buildRecord directly, and asserts both canaries absent from returned canonical record bytes. Model IDs are public probe_model. Exact command `go test ./internal/endpointconformance/... ./internal/model/... ./cmd/sworn/...` exits0 (N-03).

WHEN probe exits0 THE SYSTEM SHALL write data model exactly `{"$schema":"https://swornagent.dev/schemas/endpoint-dialect-record-v1.json","version":1,"provider":"<canonical>","endpoint":{"scheme":"http|https","host":"<safe-authority>"},"probe_model":"<non-empty>","observed_at":"<UTC-whole-second>","self_checks":{"assistant_content":{"mutated":"protocol-rejected","restored":"accepted"},"nullable_tool_calls":{"production":"accepted","mutation":"protocol-error"}},"dialect_observations":{"max_tokens":<ProbeResult>,"max_completion_tokens":<ProbeResult>,"system_role":<ProbeResult>,"developer_role":<ProbeResult>},"capability_observations":{"strict_json_schema":<ProbeResult>,"forced_tool":<ProbeResult>,"multiple_stops":<ProbeResult>,"streaming":<ProbeResult>,"reasoning_effort":<ProbeResult>,"temperature_zero":<TemperatureResult>}}` with no extras. Raw bytes UTF-8 json.MarshalIndent two spaces, Go HTML escaping, displayed field order, one LF/no BOM. observed_at injected clock UTC truncated seconds layout `2006-01-02T15:04:05Z`. probe_model is exact non-empty --model string without trim/case/path/alias normalization. Ordinary ProbeResult exactly `{"classification":"accepted|rejected|ignored|inconclusive","attempts":[<Attempt>]}` with one call/Attempt; TemperatureResult classification,attempts,temperature_stability with three calls/Attempts. Attempt field order status_code,error_class,input_tokens,output_tokens; error_class present exactly for rejected4xx and equals `http-status-<decimal-code>`; input/output present exactly for corresponding non-negative usage member. Provider S01 Prefix. Host is ASCII DNS labels matching `[A-Za-z0-9](?:[A-Za-z0-9-]{0,61}[A-Za-z0-9])?` no trailing dot lowercase, or unzoned IPv4/IPv6 netip.ParseAddr emitted Addr.String with IPv6 brackets. Digits-and-dots host with a dot must parse IPv4; `999.999.999.999`,`01.2.3.4`,`1.2.3` invalid. Unicode, percent escapes, zones, malformed IP, other forms invalid. Explicit port decimal1..65535/no leading zero retained including defaults; absent stays absent. Attempts contain no body/text/headers/path/query/prompt; unknown fields fail schema (C-06,N-03).
